bodyText: NEW Turn your AI into a social media manager → PostPlanify Features Integrations Resources Pricing What's New? Login Try for free Schedule a demo AI social media manager Social media management built for agencies and growing teams Schedule posts, track analytics, manage your inbox, and collaborate with your team across 10 platforms — from one dashboard. Try it for free Schedule a Call Trusted by 2150+ businesses Watch "How It Works" · 6 mins TRUSTED BY AGENCIES AND BRANDS IN 60+ COUNTRIES Everything you need to manage social media One platform for scheduling, analytics, inbox, AI, and team collaboration — built for agencies and growing teams. One calendar. All your posts. Plan, edit, and reschedule across all your platforms from one drag-and-drop calendar. 10 platforms in one view Drag & drop scheduling Bulk upload via CSV See what actually works Track performance, engagement, and growth across all 10 platforms. Historical trends included. Cross-platform analytics Best time to post Custom date ranges Never miss a comment or DM again All your comments + DMs in one place. Reply, label, assign to teammates, and let AI help you respond faster. Unified inbox AI reply suggestions Assign + label No per-seat pricing Invite team members and clients into one workspace. Shared calendar, approval workflows, post comments + @mentions and role-based permissions — flat pricing. Flat pricing Roles & permissions Approvals Create posts faster with AI Generate captions, create images, and improve your content - all with built-in AI assistant. AI captions AI images AI insights Reports your clients will actually read Every report carries your brand — logo, accent color, custom footer. Trend charts from all 10 platforms baked in. Download or share a link. White-label PDF Custom branding Shareable links All your media, organized Store, organize and reuse your brand assets in one shared library. Import from Canva, Google Drive or Dropbox when needed. Canva integration Google Drive + Dropbox Reusable assets One link for everything One page. All your links. Styled to match your brand. Custom branding Analytics built-in Unlimited blocks Try it for free Loved by agencies & teams ❤️ Real stories from people running their social presence on PostPlanify. “I've tried many social media schedulers and PostPlanify is by far the best value-for-money — especially for agencies. The white-label reports and per-client workspaces save us hours every week.” Andreas Luis Founder, arcdigital.ro 20+ CLIENTS 180 ACCOUNTS 5 COUNTRIES “Finally a tool that doesn't nickel-and-dime you for every feature. The AI assistant, content calendar, and inbox work exactly the way you'd expect — and the team is incredibly responsive.” Eric Bai Co-founder, shopmeagent.com 12+ CLIENTS 95 ACCOUNTS 3 COUNTRIES “Switched from a much more expensive competitor and haven't looked back. Setup took 10 minutes, the UI is clean, and our engagement has noticeably improved across every platform.” Umut Yorulmaz Founder, udydigital.com 35+ CLIENTS 240 ACCOUNTS 8 COUNTRIES Live count 125M+ Posts published Platforms 10 supported TikTok, IG, YT, X, FB, LI, Pinterest, Threads, Bluesky, WP Accounts 180K+ Social accounts connected Join 2,150+ users Growing every day across 60+ countries 4.9/5 500+ reviews Connect and publish to all your favorite platforms TikTok Instagram YouTube X / Twitter Facebook LinkedIn Pinterest Threads Bluesky WordPress Who is PostPlanify for? Managing multiple client accounts Keep every client organized in their own workspace. Manage content, analytics, and approvals — then export white-label PDF reports to share with them. Working with a team Shared calendars, approval workflows, and role-based access. Add your whole team — no per-seat fees. Running it solo Schedule across 10 platforms, track analytics, and manage comments. One inbox, one calendar, no complexity. What our customers say on G2 and Trustpilot G2 verified May 24, 2026 “PostPlanify helped us with Social Scheduling, Approvals, and Inbox in One Place” We manage 8 social media accounts across LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Facebook, TikTok and YouTube. Before PostPlanify we had two people on Buffer, someone else posting natively, and a Notion doc for approvals — a total mess. PostPlanify replaced all of it. Approvals, scheduling, and the inbox now live in one place. The pricing is fair and the support is genuinely fast. Frank B. Business Owner, Small-Business G2 verified May 22, 2026 “Seamless Claude Code Integration — A Real Game Changer” The integration with Claude Code has been seamless, and it's been a real game changer for us. Pulling ongoing performance insights via Claude Code and pushing the answers into our existing dashboards has saved hours every week. Setup was the easiest we've had with any social tool. M Verified User in Marketing Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.) Trustpilot June 18, 2026 “Great support, great system, I highly recommend” This has made social media planning and posting so much easier. I can manage all of my platforms in one place, the calendar view makes it really clear to see where I am missing content and the support has been fantastic. I have been using it for a few months now and they have already added extra features that I asked for. C Carol Phillips GB · 2 reviews G2 verified April 14, 2026 “Effortless API Integration and Analytics at Its Best” I use PostPlanify a lot, particularly its API integration, which I find really valuable as it connects well with my internal tools and personal accounts. It's easy to integrate into my apps, which makes my workflow much faster and smoother, especially when handling repetitive scheduling across multiple brands. Oguz D. Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.) I manage over 13 accounts and some of the videos reach over 500,000 views!” Monta “PostPlanify has transformed our social media management. The interface is intuitive, and the scheduling works with precision, allowing the AprovaLeges team to focus on what truly matters: producing quality content.” AprovaLeges “postplanify is the best ive seen so far, has all the features i need.” Shaheer “PostPlanify mixes AI captions, multi-platform scheduling, and Canva templates. Overall a massive time saver for agencies.” Aleksandr Heinlaid “We're loving PostPlanify. I've been using scheduling tools for years and it's by far the best one.” Tintin “Really helped me manage my time better and keep all my posts organized in one place.” Andreas “It's looking great!! Just what I needed to make my SM game up to the next level.” Sam You Talk to the Founder. Not a Chatbot. Hasan Cagli Founder @ PostPlanify 10.1K+ Followers If you've ever used an enterprise social media tool, you know how it goes. 💰 $249+/user/month ⏳ Support tickets that take days 📉 Feature requests that go nowhere I built PostPlanify because that model is broken. Here's what you get instead: Message me on WhatsApp — I'm the founder, and I reply 💬 Request a feature — it ships in days, not quarters 🚀 Report a bug — it gets fixed the same day 🛠️ Add your whole team — no per-seat fees, ever We're a small team. That's not a limitation. It's why we move faster and care more about your workflow than any enterprise tool ever will. 7-day free trial Test everything before you commit Cancel anytime No long-term commitments required 14-day money back guarantee Refunds available within 14 days Try for Free Sign up with Google Included in All Plans Build with PostPlanify API Automate your social media workflows, build custom integrations, and connect your own tools — all through a simple, well-documented REST API. ✓ No extra cost ✓ Simple setup Explore API Docs Get Your API Key Prefer using AI?
